children.text: wholly owned by one or more individuals or entities described in subsection (b);
at least 5 net tons as measured under part J of this subtitle; and
not documented under the laws of a foreign country.
An individual who is a citizen of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: each of its members is a citizen of the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: it is capable of holding title to a vessel under the laws of the United States or a State.

children.label: A
children.text: each general partner is a citizen of the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: the controlling interest in the partnership is owned by citizens of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: it is incorporated under the laws of the United States or a State;

children.label: B
children.text: its chief executive officer, by whatever title, and the chairman of its board of directors are citizens of the United States; and

children.label: C
children.text: no more of its directors are noncitizens than a minority of the number necessary to constitute a quorum.

children.heading: .—Temporary Certificates Prior to Measurement
children.label: c .—Temporary Certificates Prior to Measurement
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (a)(2), the Secretary may issue a temporary certificate of documentation for a vessel before it is measured.
